perf_hint: one pass over the uniform and no textures, so frame time scales with pixel count alone — on software rendering preview with `--sample 10s` before committing to 1080p

params.name: sun_size
params.description: The sun's radius, as a fraction of the frame's short edge.

params.name: scanlines
params.description: How many stripes cut the sun; 0 leaves it whole.

params.name: grid
params.description: How dense the floor grid is.

params.name: speed
params.description: How fast the floor scrolls toward the viewer.

params.name: pulse
params.description: How hard the kick pulses the grid lines.

params.name: flare
params.description: How brightly a hit flares the horizon line.

params.name: stars
params.description: How bright the sky's stars are; the air band twinkles them.

params.name: vignette
params.description: How far the corners of the frame fall off.

params.name: brightness
params.description: How much light the loudness of the song puts into the scene.
